chunks.text: Technical Reports - Beresford N. Parlett. LAPACK Working Note 163: How the MRRR Algorithm Can Fail on Tight Eigenvalue Clusters (CSD-04-1367) by Beresford N. Parlett and Christof Voemel. LAPACK Working Note 162: The Design and Implementation of the MRRR Algorithm (CSD-04-1346) by Inderjit Dhillon, Beresford N. Parlett and Christof Voemel. Residual Bounds on Approximate Eigensystems of Nonnormal Matrices (M80/39) by B.N. Parlett and E. Jiang. The Discrete Fourier Transform Via Circulants (M80/37) by B.N. Parlett.
chunks.question: What are some technical reports by Beresford N. Parlett?
chunks.answer: LAPACK notes and matrix analysis papers.

chunks.text: How Far Should You Go with the Lanczos Process? (M78/48) by W. Kahan and B.N. Parlett. The Lanczos Algorithm with Implicit Deflation (M77/70) by B.N. Parlett and D.S. Scott. A Program to Swap Diagonal Blocks (M77/66) by B.N. Parlett. A New Proof of Global Convergence for the Tridiagonal QL Algorithm (M77/48) by W. Hoffman and B.N. Parlett. Progress in Numerical Analysis (M77/26) by B. Parlett.
chunks.question: What topics do Parlett's reports cover?

chunks.text: Can You Count on Your Calculator (M77/21) by W. Kahan and B.N. Parlett. Roundoff Error in the Solution of Finite Element Systems (M593) by Beresford Parlett. A Program to Compute the Real Schur Form of a Real Square Matrix (M526) by B.N. Parlett and R. Feldman. A Program to Compute the Condition Numbers of Matrix Eigenvalues Without Computing Eigenvectors (M517) by S.P. Chan, R. Feldman and B.N. Parlett. Computation of Functions of Triangular Matrices (M481) by B.N. Parlett. An Analysis of Lanczos Algorithms for Symmetric Matrices (M467) by W. Kahan and B. Parlett.
